CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, nullable_col Nullable(UInt32), non_nullable_col UInt32) ENGINE = Log;
INSERT INTO test_table (id, nullable_col, non_nullable_col) VALUES (1, NULL, 100), (2, 200, 200), (3, 300, 300);
CREATE TABLE subquery_table (val Nullable(Int32)) ENGINE = Log;
SELECT isNullable(val) FROM (SELECT val FROM subquery_table);
CREATE TABLE join_table (id UInt32, fk Nullable(UInt32)) ENGINE = Log;
INSERT INTO join_table (id, fk) VALUES (1, 1), (2, NULL), (3, 3);
SELECT a.id, isNullable(b.fk) FROM join_table AS a JOIN test_table AS b ON a.id = b.id;
SELECT id, isNullable(nullable_col) FROM (SELECT id, nullable_col FROM test_table WHERE id > 1);
CREATE TABLE complex_table (a Nullable(UInt32), b UInt32) ENGINE = Log;
SELECT isNullable(a), isNullable(b) FROM complex_table WHERE b = 10;
CREATE TABLE multiple_nullable (col1 Nullable(UInt32), col2 Nullable(UInt32), col3 UInt32) ENGINE = Log;
INSERT INTO multiple_nullable (col1, col2, col3) VALUES (1, NULL, 30), (NULL, 2, 40), (3, 3, 50);
SELECT isNullable(col1), isNullable(col2), isNullable(col3) FROM multiple_nullable;
SELECT isNullable((SELECT nullable_col FROM test_table WHERE id = 1)) AS is_nullable_value;
SELECT isNullable(ANY(fk)) FROM join_table GROUP BY id;
